description: pluginize observation hook — on stop, quietly watch for reusable-structure candidates and propose pluginizing only when one surfaces

hooks.rewakeMessage: A reusable-structure candidate surfaced in the user's recent work. Surface it to the user as a suggestion to consider pluginizing — they can run /pluginize:propose-plugin to review and approve. This is supplementary; it does not replace your previous response, and it must not interrupt or override the user's original request:
